title: Japanese Pasta Dish
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Italian flavors, this dish combines the intense flavor of a Ukrainian-inspired sauce with chewy pasta.

ingredients.name: Pasta
ingredients.notes: Chewy pasta, such as udon or soba

instructions: Cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Ukrainian sauce and bring to a simmer.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Toss the cooked pasta in the sauce until well coated.
Transfer the pasta to a serving dish and garnish with sliced green onions.
